name: 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP
about: 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP is a general medicine used for the treatment of hypertension. Each tablet contains 5 mg of Cilnidipine as the active ingredient. Manufactured in India, this solid dosage form comes in the form of tablets that need to be stored in a dry place. Cilnidipine is a calcium channel blocker that works by relaxing the blood vessels and allowing the blood to flow more easily. It is often prescribed to patients with high blood pressure, angina, and other heart-related conditions.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP is one tablet per day, or as prescribed by your doctor.

faq.q: Can 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP be used to treat other medical conditions?
faq.a: No, 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP is primarily used for the treatment of hypertension and related heart conditions only.

faq.q: Are there any side effects of using 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, some common side effects of using 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP include dizziness, headache, flushing, nausea, and stomach pain. If you experience any severe side effects, please consult your doctor immediately.

faq.q: Can 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP be taken during pregnancy?
faq.a: It is important to consult your doctor before taking 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP during pregnancy. It is not recommended to use this medicine during pregnancy unless prescribed by a doctor.

faq.q: Is a prescription required to purchase 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP?
faq.a: Yes, a prescription is required to purchase 5 MG Cilnidipine Tablets IP. Please consult your doctor before using this medicine.
